texto: Writing poetry is talking to oneself; yet it is a mode of talking to oneself in which the self disappears; and the product's something that, though it may not be for everybody, is about everybody.
explicacao: Citação de Richard Wilbur sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Writing poetry is talking to oneself; yet it is a mode of talking to oneself in which the self di…” articula reflexao, poetry, talking em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.

texto: If the king had given me for my ownParis, his citadel,And I for that must leave aloneHer whom I love so well,I'd say then to the CrownTake back your glittering townMy darling is more fair, I swear.My darling is more fair.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Richard Wilbur sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. A afirmação “If the king had given me for my ownParis, his citadel,And I for that must leave aloneHer whom I l…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a amor, love, paris, útil em momentos de paris.
